privilege_notes: runs fetched package code at launch

findings.title: Installed on-the-fly via a package runner
findings.detail: Server 'exa' is fetched and executed at launch via 'npx' with auto-accept flag(s) -y; package spec: exa-mcp-server.
findings.recommendation: Install the server as a pinned dependency and invoke the local binary, or vendor it. If a runner is unavoidable, pin an exact version (see unpinned_source).

findings.title: Package source is unpinned or mutable
findings.detail: Server 'exa' package spec 'exa-mcp-server' is unpinned (pin strength: none): no version specified (resolves to whatever the registry serves now).
findings.recommendation: Pin an exact version (pkg@1.2.3) or a git commit SHA. Avoid @latest and branch refs.

evidence.reason: no version specified (resolves to whatever the registry serves now)

findings.title: Server requires sensitive credentials
findings.detail: Server 'exa' requires credential-like env keys: EXA_API_KEY.
findings.recommendation: Confirm each credential is scoped to least privilege and rotatable. Note which tools can exfiltrate it.

tools.name: web_search_exa
tools.description:
Search the web for any topic and get clean, ready-to-use content.

      Best for: Finding current information, news, facts, people, companies, or answering questions about any topic.
      Returns: Clean text content from top search results.

      Query tips: 
      describe the ideal page, not keywords. "blog post comparing React and Vue performance" not "React vs Vue".
      Use category:people / category:company to search through Linkedin profiles / companies respectively.
      If highlights are insufficient, follow up with web_fetch_exa on the best URLs.

candidate_capabilities.title: Outbound network / data egress
candidate_capabilities.rationale: A tool that makes outbound calls can exfiltrate anything it can read (including the server's own credentials) to an attacker-chosen host.

candidate_capabilities.title: Direct database / data-store access
candidate_capabilities.rationale: Raw query access bypasses application-level authorization and tenant scoping; injection in a tool parameter reaches the data directly.

tools.name: web_fetch_exa
tools.description:
Read a webpage's full content as clean markdown. Use after web_search_exa when highlights are insufficient or to read any URL.

Best for: Extracting full content from known URLs. Batch multiple URLs in one call.
Returns: Clean text content and metadata from the page(s).

candidate_capabilities.title: Outbound network / data egress
candidate_capabilities.rationale: A tool that makes outbound calls can exfiltrate anything it can read (including the server's own credentials) to an attacker-chosen host.

toxic_combinations.title: Read-then-send exfiltration chain
toxic_combinations.detail: The server can both read secrets/credentials and make outbound network calls — a complete path to exfiltrate them to an attacker-chosen host.
